highlights.text: My general lean is to defer to the trend.
As I also discussed yesterday though, phrases like “buy the dip” are fairly useless, because one has to know where and how.
My system answers this question but identifying the core footprint of institutional accumulation: The Failed Breakdown.
All major rallies and squeezes are caused by a Failed Breakdown.

Case in point: I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “ As long as the above supports hold (5492-85 lowest), 5565, 5582, then 5620-25 are next batch of targets.” Yesterday we sold down to 5492-85 exact low of day, put in another Failed Breakdown of a big shelf of lows from Sunday evening at 5515, and squeezed into the close to 5565.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the recent Failed Breakdowns we had including Friday’s & yesterday’s; specifically emphasizing the entry trigger portion of the setup for education.

post_title: An Incredible 6 Green Days In A Row For SPX. Can Bulls Really Do 7? April 30 Plan
